title: Lead Investment Banker at United India Insurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at United India Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, United India Insurance in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About United India Insurance:
United India Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with United India Insurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
